channel.title: Home on Ayush
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Ayush

item.title: About
item.description:
in this small corner of the web, let me share a bit of my story.

i’m ayush.

yeah, like the kid in the picture above, i’ve always been this curious kid, wandering about the complexity of this world, tinkering here and there. now, i explore the world through words and code.

i’ve always wanted to study arts and humanities, but destiny had some other plans. here i am on the verge of graduating with a CS degree. honestly, i didn’t like it initially, but now i have started loving it. i feel like i’m a walking paradox; i love poetry and art as much as i love science and deep tech.

item.title: Reads
item.description:
here are some books that i’ve read. all of them were good; some were great, and a few were remarkable.

Bookshelf

  • Phantoms in the Brain
    V.S. Ramachandran

  • The Precipice
    Toby Ord

  • A Brief History of Time
    Stephen Hawking

  • Destiny, Freedom and the Soul
    Osho

  • Four Thousand Weeks
    Oliver Burkeman

  • Mindfulness in the Modern World
    Osho

  • Man’s Search for Meaning
    Victor E. Frankl

  • The Journey of Being Human
    Osho

  • Ratan Tata
    A.K. Gandhi
